title: ciliaria aspera
intro: Ciliaria aspera, also known as Spiny Ciliaria, is a plant species belonging to the family Amaranthaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ciliaria aspera include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Ciliaria aspera can be prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, which is often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
